atomicity.message: Staged payload is exactly the OXP ORCHESTRATOR.md scaffold target/template unit: explicit target aliases, template wiring, conditional AGENTS pointer, and focused scaffold/init/template drift tests.

No browser UI, terminal rendering change, screenshot surface, canvas, or responsive layout is staged.

Clean staged snapshot focused tests and go test ./... passed; restaged checks also passed against c8d0a2d.

conditions.message: The implemented explicit target is opt-in and the template keeps AGENTS as the authority instead of granting orchestrators unilateral power.
evidence: BrightOwl inspected TargetOrchestrator absence from standard/default targets and presence only as explicit aliases.
The ORCHESTRATOR template instructs orchestrators to ask for narrow human rulings and points to AGENTS for gate and completion rules.
